name: Meteors
summary: A background component with multiple meteor streaks that fall from top with random delays and CSS animations.
detailedDescription: Meteors creates a shower of falling stars using pure CSS animations. The component generates a configurable number of meteor elements (default 20), each positioned absolutely across an 800px horizontal range centered in the container. Meteors start 40px above the container top and fall using the 'meteor-effect' animation. Each meteor is a 0.5px rotated square (45deg) with slate-500 background and white shadow border. A ::before pseudo-element creates the tail - a 50px wide gradient line from #64748b to transparent extending left from the meteor. Animation duration is randomized between 5-10 seconds, with random delay 0-5 seconds, creating organic non-repeating patterns. The animation loops infinitely with CSS animation property. Meteors are evenly distributed horizontally using index-based positioning (idx * 800/count - 400). The component fades in over 0.5s on mount using Framer Motion. This creates a peaceful, cosmic atmosphere suitable for dark-themed backgrounds, wish-making interfaces, or any context where falling stars add magical ambiance without overwhelming foreground content.
purpose: Add cosmic ambiance to dark backgrounds
behavior: Applies random animation duration and delay
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
